title: eto.memo.payment.v1
description: Payload schema for a structured payment memo. Validates the `payload` portion of an eto.memo.payment.v1 envelope; envelope shape is defined in docs/memo-schema-registry.md §2.

invoice_id.description: Producer-issued invoice identifier; unique per producer.

task_id.description: Optional reference to a coordination_log task this payment fulfills.

quantity.description: Optional unit count; total = unit_price_lamports * quantity.
